subcodes.first_line: In the tribulations ordained by the Lord of all creation at every moment lie signs for all who dwell in the realms of being, having embraced adversity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان فی ابتلاء مالک الامکان فی کل الاحیان لایات لمن فی الاکوان قد قبل الشده
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
